mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_partner_application ( member_id, company_name, manager_name_title, phone, email, industry, etc_request, contract_agreed, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{companyName}, #{managerNameTitle}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{industry}, #{etcRequest}, #{contractAgreed}, '대기', NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM biz_partner_application WHERE member_id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = #{memberId} AND status = '대기'

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(oi.price * oi.quantity), 0) FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.oid = o.oid WHERE o.id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = #{memberId} AND oi.order_status IN ('결제완료', '배송준비중', '배송중', '배송완료')

SELECT a.id, a.member_id AS memberId, a.company_name AS companyName, a.manager_name_title AS managerNameTitle, a.phone, a.email, a.industry, a.status, a.created_at AS createdAt, m.name AS memberName FROM biz_partner_application a JOIN member m ON a.member_id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = m.id ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id, a.member_id AS memberId, a.company_name AS companyName, a.manager_name_title AS managerNameTitle, a.phone, a.email, a.industry, a.etc_request AS etcRequest, a.contract_agreed AS contractAgreed, a.status, a.admin_reply AS adminReply, a.created_at AS createdAt, a.reviewed_at AS reviewedAt, m.name AS memberName, m.partner_status AS partnerStatus, m.partner_grade AS partnerGrade FROM biz_partner_application a JOIN member m ON a.member_id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = m.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM biz_partner_application WHERE status = '대기'
SELECT partner_status AS status, partner_grade AS partnerGrade FROM member WHERE id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = #{memberId}
SELECT admin_reply AS adminReply, reviewed_at AS reviewedAt, status FROM biz_partner_application WHERE member_id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = #{memberId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
